title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
